content_en:
The Prophet (r) strictly forbade wailing and screaming, or the hiring of mourners. Furthermore, he identified such practices as acts of Kufr (disbelief), because they indicate displeasure with what Allaah has decreed. Eemaan (faith) includes the belief that Allaah is the source of all good and all of His actions are wise. Proper Eemaan would never allow those who possess it to commit such acts of ignorance. ўРпї≠ўДўП пЇНпїЯпї†п±†пї™о†°пЇіо††пЇУпєґ пїЧпєґпЇОўДўО пїЧпєґпЇОўДўО пЇ≠о††пЇ≠о†Ґпїіо††пЇ≠о†° пЇГўОпЇТўРпї≤ пїЂо†Ґпї•о††пїЛ r :)) пїУўРпї≤ о†°пї•о†Ґ пЇНпїЯпїБп±†пїМо†§ пїЬпєЄпїФпєЊпЇ≠о†ҐпЇО пЇТўРпїђўРпї°о††пї§о†°пЇНпЇЬпєЊпї®пєґпЇШпєґпЇОпї•ўР пїУўРпї≤ пЇНпїЯпї®п±†пЇОпЇ±ўР пїЂ пЇХўРо†ђпїіо††пї†пєґпї∞ пЇНпїЯпєЊпї§о††пЇФпєЄ пїЛо††пЇОпЇ§о††пЇНпїЯпї®п±Ґпїіо††пЇПўР пї≠о††пЇНпїЯпї®п±†пЇі ((. Aboo Hurayrah quoted the Prophet (r) as saying, вАЬThere are two practices found among people, both of which indicate Kufr: ridiculing the ancestry (of others) and wailing over the dead.вАЭ37 вАШAbdullaah ibn вАШUmar also reported that Hafsah38 cried when вАШUmar died and he said to her вАЬTake it easy. DonвАЩt you know that the Messenger of Allaah (r) said, )) ўРпї™о†Ґпї†пєґпїіо††пї†ўРпї™ўР пїЛо†ҐпїЬпєґпЇОпЇАўР пЇГўОпїЂо†° пЇТўРпЇТо†°пЇЂп±†пЇПо††пїМо†°пЇХпєґ пїіо†ђпїіо†† пЇНпїЯпєЊпї§о†®пЇЗўРпї• (( вАЬVerily the dead are punished in their grave by the wailing of their family over them.вАЭ39 The dead will suffer due to the wailing of relatives in two cases : 37 Reported by Aboo Hurayrah and collected by Muslim and al-Bayhaqee Sahih Muslim, vol.1, p.44 no. 128. 38 Hafsah was one of the ProphetвАЩs wives and daughter of вАШUmar ibn al-Khattaab, the second caliph. 39 Reported by Ibn вАШUmar and collected by al-Bukhaaree and Muslim Sahih Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, vol.2, p.213 no.379, Sahih Muslim, vol.2, p.439 no.2015, Sunan Abu Dawud, vol.2, p.891 no. 3123, Sunan Ibn-i-Majah, vol.2, p.444 no.1593 and Mishkat Al-Masabih,, vol.1, pp.360-61 by вАШAbdullaah ibn вАШUmar.

(a) When the deceased requested mourning prior to his death. (b) If the deceased knew that it was the practice of the people and he did not request that they do not do so over him.
content_id:
Nabi пЈЇ secara tegas melarang meratap dan berteriak, atau menyewa orang untuk meratap. Selain itu, beliau menyebut praktik-praktik semacam itu sebagai perbuatan kufur, karena hal itu menunjukkan ketidakridaan terhadap apa yang telah Allah tetapkan. Iman mencakup keyakinan bahwa Allah adalah sumber segala kebaikan dan semua tindakan-Nya adalah bijaksana. Iman yang benar tidak akan pernah membiarkan mereka yang memilikinya melakukan perbuatan kebodohan semacam itu. Abu Hurairah mengutip Nabi пЈЇ bersabda, "Ada dua kebiasaan yang terdapat pada manusia, keduanya merupakan bentuk kufur: mencela nasab (orang lain) dan meratapi jenazah." Abdullah bin Umar juga melaporkan bahwa Hafsah menangis ketika Umar meninggal, dan ia berkata kepadanya, "Tenanglah. Tidakkah engkau tahu bahwa Rasulullah пЈЇ bersabda, 'Sesungguhnya jenazah disiksa di kuburnya karena ratapan keluarganya atasnya.'"

Jenazah akan menderita karena ratapan keluarga dalam dua kasus: (a) Ketika almarhum meminta ratapan sebelum kematiannya. (b) Jika almarhum mengetahui bahwa itu adalah kebiasaan orang-orang dan ia tidak meminta mereka untuk tidak melakukannya atas dirinya.
